options.name: -include_children
options.description: {off color multicolor} Option to decide whether the children of HInst will be colored simultaneously or not. off: The child instance will not be colored. color: Color-code the child instances with the color the same with their parent instance. multicolor: Use multiple colors to the child instances.

options.name: -multicolor
options.description: Use multiple colors to the objects

options.name: -object_name
options.description: Specifies the Inst, Hinst, PowerDomain or InstGroup name, it supports objects list

options.name: -object_type
options.description: Specifies the list of objects such as SDP, BusGuide, Module, PowerDomain, InstGroup ...
